title: Controversial streamer Clavicular accused of abuse and fraud in explosive lawsuit by influencer
summary_full: Influencer Aleksandra Vasilevna Mendoza has filed a lawsuit against streamer Clavicular, real name Braden Peters, alleging abuse, fraud, and emotional harm. Mendoza claims Peters exploited her trust, promising career advancement but instead causing significant distress and damage. The suit details accusations of non-consensual sexual encounters and an unauthorized facial injection. Peters' lawyer denies all claims.
